No TripAdvisor ad-performance email in this window. Reviews/reservations/business profile/payroll not in scope this run -- carried forward from the 4 AM run unchanged.
systemStatus.detail:
Thu Jul 23 ~7:00-7:20 AM PT run (Gmail + live Google Ads + live Yelp Ads Chrome scrape; no Google Business Profile review re-check this run).

TOAST: GROUP-level Daily Performance Summary for WED JUL 22 received 6:24 AM PT and parsed live: net $5,479.27 / gross $5,603.60 / 215 guests / 129 orders / avg guest $25.48 / avg order $42.47. Labor 20.9% of net (~$1,145). Discounts 2.2% of gross (~$123), refunds $0, deferred $0, 8 void items, 108 card payments, 0 open orders, no auto-clock-outs. Takeout: 3 orders / $57.50. Location-level breakdown (labor $, dayparts, rooms, checks) has not arrived separately; labor $ and discount $ are derived from the GROUP-level percentages. Prior 'toast' (Tue Jul 21) rolled to toastPrevDay.

SLING: Daily report for THU JUL 23 received 7:01 AM PT: 9 staff / 9 shifts / 43.40 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 1 off. Prior 'sling' (Wed Jul 22) rolled to slingLastKnown.

GOOGLE ADS: LIVE scrape ~7:15 AM PT. Yesterday (Jul 22): $64.32 spend (up $15.05) / 6,211 impressions (up 605) / 122 clicks (down 3) / 0 conversions (calculating). PMax-2 still limited by budget and policy; BHC Coffee Search steady; World Cup HQ 2026 and Oldest SB Brewery on Tap remain paused at 0. No disapprovals or budget alerts observed.

YELP ADS: LIVE scrape ~7:20 AM PT. Last 30 days: 29.8k ad impressions (72% of total), 388 ad clicks, 526 page visits from ads, 151 leads from ads (59% of total). Billing period (Jul 1-22) spend $300.51, CPC $0.98, CPL $2.55 (improved from $2.58). Bonus budget remaining still not surfaced on the dashboard.

TRIPADVISOR: No new ad-performance email in this run's window; most recent one was from Jul 20, not today.

Reviews, reservations, business profile, and payroll sections are outside this run's scope and are carried forward unchanged from the 4 AM run.

googleAds.note_20260720: Mon Jul 20 7 AM run, LIVE scrape. Spend is creeping up while output falls: yesterday $58.63 for 178 clicks and 0 recorded conversions, and the 7-day window shows cost UP $20.37 while impressions are DOWN 10,646, clicks DOWN 96 and conversions DOWN 176.15. Only 2 of 4 campaigns are live. 'World Cup HQ 2026' ($20/day) is now PAUSED and the Final has passed -- archive it and reclaim the budget line. 'Oldest SB Brewery on Tap' is paused with ALL ASSET GROUPS LIMITED BY POLICY, and the same policy limit is also flagged on the active PMax-2 campaign alongside 'Limited by budget' -- the policy restriction is the more actionable of the two. No disapprovals, no budget alerts.

tripAdvisor.note: Thu Jul 23 7 AM run: no new TripAdvisor ad-performance email in the last 24-48h search window. Most recent analytics@hm2.tripadvisor.com email ('Your Ads are getting some MAJOR attention!') was actually received Mon Jul 20, 12:30 PM PT, not today as a prior run's note suggested -- correcting that here. Only destination-marketing emails from updates@mp1.tripadvisor.com since then (Puerto Vallarta content), which are not ad performance notifications.

upcoming.name: Darcy Schmider
upcoming.notes: If possible, we would love an outdoor table. We are traveling to celebrate a special birthday and anniversary. Thank you.

reviews.lastUpdated: 2026-07-23 -- Thu Jul 23 4 AM run. LIVE browser check of both Google Business Profile Unreplied tabs (source of truth, per standing instruction -- both listings rendered successfully this run).
reviews.note: BOTH GOOGLE LISTINGS CHECKED LIVE via business.google.com Unreplied tabs. THE BREWHOUSE: only Nate B (5 stars, new, ~6 hrs old) remains unanswered -- Ronald Johnson (3 stars) and Thuy Anh Le (5 stars, photo-only), flagged in the prior run, have since been replied to. BREWHOUSE COFFEE: Christie Hahn (5 stars, posted Jul 19, now 4 days old) is still unanswered. NOTHING POSTED -- Joal approves every reply before it goes out.

unanswered.author: Nate B
unanswered.snippet: I really enjoyed this place. The burger was good. Great beer selection. Service was great. Prices were reasonable. I would definitely recommend this place.

unanswered.author: Christie Hahn
unanswered.snippet: A Perfect 10/10 Experience! If you are looking for a spot that takes both its craft and its hospitality seriously, this is it. The Coffee: Absolute perfection -- smooth, perfectly dialed-in espresso with velvety, flawless microfoam. The Service: incredibly welcoming and genuinely friendly staff.

summary.method: Live browser check of business.google.com Unreplied tab for both profile IDs (rendered successfully this run).
